name: @aflo/integrations
description: External-provider adapters behind AFLO-owned interfaces so no provider schema leaks into domain logic. Hosts the vendor-discovery registry (contract-lifecycle source of truth; nothing enabled in V1) and disabled provider skeletons (e.g. Experian credit-data). Regulated execution always stays with a contracted provider; AFLO never stores raw card numbers, CVVs, bank-account numbers, or payment credentials.
